title: Tilray's Surge: How Marijuana Reclassification Could Reshape the Cannabis Sector
text: Tilray's surge following marijuana reclassification highlights how federal policy changes could reshape the cannabis sector. Rescheduling from Schedule I to Schedule III enables improved research opportunities and provides some tax benefits for cannabis businesses. Tilray's strong international footprint and medical cannabis expertise position it to benefit from emerging regulatory frameworks. The company's ability to leverage scale across multiple markets gives it competitive advantages as the industry evolves.
